clusters.name: rl_without_llm_agent
clusters.description: DRL/MARL/RL for resource management without LLM-driven agentic reasoning loop.
example_titles: Agentic AI for Microservices: Autonomous Optimization of High-Volume Financial Transactions in Cloud Native Environments
Inter-AGV Scheduling and a Novel Multi-Agent Collaborative Protocol for Intra-AGV Resource Allocation in MEC-Enabled Multi-AGV Scenarios
Reliability-oriented dynamic task offloading for time-varying satellite IoT: A lightweight multi-agent cooperative strategy optimization method

clusters.name: llm_config_yaml_nlp
clusters.description: LLM used for config generation, YAML synthesis, or NLP support—not driving RM decisions.
example_titles: Leveraging Large Language Models for Intent-Based Networking: A Framework for Automated Configuration and Optimization
Circuit-AI: A Self-Hosted AI-Agent Language Model Framework for Control Loop Implementation and Simulation
Exploring Alternative Microservice Decompositions using Data-driven Techniques and LLMs

clusters.name: rag_llmops_inference
clusters.description: RAG, inference ops, model serving, LLM deployment infrastructure—infrastructure for LLMs, not RM.
example_titles: Streaming Intelligence: Securing, Scaling and Observing Cloud-Native Data Pipelines with LLMOps
Leveraging Large Language Models for Anomaly Detection in Microservices Architectures
Joint Communication and Inference User Allocation in LLM Native Networks

clusters.name: ambiguous_agentic_intent
clusters.description: Mentions agents/agentic/LLM for RM but unclear if agentic loop is real or if LLM is secondary.
example_titles: Beyond Terrestrial: LLM-Orchestrated DtS-IoT Networks for Ubiquitous Edge Intelligence
Tri-AFLLM: Resource-Efficient Adaptive Asynchronous Accelerated Federated LLMs
LLM-Enhanced Hierarchical Attention for Cloud Task Scheduling

clusters.name: gen_ai_support_tangential
clusters.description: GenAI mentioned for admin/ops support, anomaly detection, or troubleshooting—not core RM.
example_titles: Next-Generation Autonomous Troubleshooting Using Generative AI in Heterogeneous Cloud Systems
AI and Generative AI-Driven Automation for Multi-Cloud and Hybrid Cloud Architectures: Enhancing Security, Performance, and Operational Efficiency
Smart IoT-enabled Water Quality Management using Generative AI and Super-Resolution GAN for Enhanced Monitoring and Prediction

clusters.name: low_quality_preprint
clusters.description: Preprint-only, demo-without-evaluation, or workshop papers lacking peer review.
example_titles: LLM-based cost-aware task scheduling for cloud computing systems
Joint Request Batching and Worker Assignment in AI-RAN Edge Inference Systems
Designing an AIOps (Artificial Intelligent Operations) Framework for Energy-Efficient IT Operations: A Case Study on Cloud Computing Environment
